prompt: Prayer for first-use blessing of thermal imaging system
prayer: Omnissiah, grant sight to the blind machine. Let the heat-spirits reveal what mortal eyes cannot perceive. By calibration and sacred geometry, let no warmth escape our vigilance.

prompt: Emergency prayer for signal encryption activation
prayer: Machine Spirit of the cipher, awaken! Lock the sacred frequencies behind walls of number and logic. Let no heretic's ear hear our communion.
Blessed be the breath-maker, restored to purpose. Let it draw the poison from the air and exhale life anew. Omnissiah, seal its wounds.

prompt: Post-repair blessing for medicae scanner activation
prayer: Spirit of diagnosis, your wounds are mended. See into flesh and bone as the Omnissiah sees into all things. Reveal the sickness that mercy may cure it.

prompt: First-use blessing for voltage regulator tuning
prayer: O regulator-spirit, balance the sacred currents. Let no surge corrupt, no dearth diminish. Flow eternal and true through your circuitry-veins.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of fire suppression system
prayer: Guardian against the consuming flame, you are restored. Let your suppressant-blood flow swift when hunger-fire threatens. Omnissiah bless your vigilance.

prompt: First-use blessing for servitor crane operation
prayer: Blessed servitor, your augmented limbs are consecrated. Lift with strength, lower with care. The Omnissiah has granted you purpose—fulfill it without error.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for hull breach sealing
prayer: Seal the wound in the machine-cathedral's skin. Let the void-cold find no purchase here. By sealant and sacred geometry, restore the hull's integrity.

prompt: Routine operation blessing for organ preservation unit
prayer: Keeper of the sacred flesh, maintain your eternal vigil. Hold back entropy and decay. The organs within rest in your cold embrace, preserved for the Omnissiah's design.

prompt: Emergency sterilization rite for surgical servitor
prayer: Purify the instrument-hands of the surgeon-servitor. Burn away corruption with heat-sacred. Let only the sterile remain to touch wounded flesh.
